description.en: Also known as cougars or pumas, these large, secretive cats are highly adaptable predators.
description.zh: 也被称为美洲豹，这些大型且隐秘的猫科动物是适应性极强的捕食者。

anatomy.en: Mountain lions are sleek, muscular cats that can weigh up to 100 kilograms and measure over 2 meters from nose to tail. They have tawny, golden-brown fur, small rounded ears, and a long, heavy tail that helps them balance while running and jumping. Their powerful hind legs allow them to leap as far as 12 meters in a single bound.
anatomy.zh: 美洲狮是体型光滑而肌肉发达的猫科动物，体重可达100公斤，从鼻子到尾巴长度超过2米。它们有着黄褐色的金棕色毛皮、小而圆的耳朵和一条长而粗的尾巴，帮助它们在奔跑和跳跃时保持平衡。强壮的后腿让它们可以一次跳远达12米。

ecology_and_behavior.en: Mountain lions are solitary hunters that stalk and ambush their prey, mainly deer. They are most active at dawn and dusk and can roam territories as large as 800 square kilometers. After a successful hunt, a mountain lion may hide its food under leaves and return to eat over several days.
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 美洲狮是独居的猎手，会悄悄跟踪并伏击猎物，主要捕食鹿。它们在黎明和黄昏时最活跃，活动范围可达800平方公里。一次成功捕猎后，美洲狮会把食物藏在树叶下面，然后连续好几天回来吃。

habitat_and_distribution.en: Mountain lions have the widest range of any wild cat in the Americas, stretching from Canada to southern Chile. They live in mountains, deserts, forests, and even swamps. In the United States, they are most common in the western states.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 美洲狮的分布范围是美洲所有野生猫科动物中最广的，从加拿大一直延伸到南美洲的智利南部。它们栖息在山脉、沙漠、森林甚至沼泽地带。在美国，它们在西部各州最为常见。
